research.title: Cyber Resilience in the Age of AI-Driven Warfare
research.summary: AI is changing the economics and speed of cyber warfare. Vulnerabilities that once required skilled research teams to discover, analyze, and weaponize can increasingly be identified and exploited in minutes or hours. Attackers can operate at machine speed,.

research.title: Horizon3.ai Joins Anthropic’s Project Glasswing to Help Defend Critical Infrastructure with the Attacker’s Perspective
research.summary: SAN FRANCISCO–July 15, 2026– Horizon3.ai, the AI-Native Proactive Security Company behind NodeZero®, today announced its participation in Anthropic’s Project Glasswing, an initiative focused on securing the world’s most critical infrastructure. Horizon3.ai.

vulns.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller and Manager Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller, formerly SD-WAN vSmart, and Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager, formerly SD-WAN vManage, contain an authentication bypass vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to bypass.
vulns.technicalSummary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller, formerly SD-WAN vSmart, and Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager, formerly SD-WAN vManage, contain an authentication bypass vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to bypass.
vulns.breakdown: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller, formerly SD-WAN vSmart, and Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager, formerly SD-WAN vManage, contain an authentication bypass vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to bypass.
vulns.whatBroke: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller, formerly SD-WAN vSmart, and Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager, formerly SD-WAN vManage, contain an authentication bypass vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to bypass.
vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at anuththara2007-W/CVE-2026-20127-Exploit-Extension.
vulns.exploitSyntax:
# authorized lab / owned targets only
git clone https://github.com/anuththara2007-W/CVE-2026-20127-Exploit-Extension
cd CVE-2026-20127-Exploit-Extension
ruby <script>.rb --target https://<authorized-target>
# confirm exact flags in the linked GitHub README before validation
chains: initial access through exposed Catalyst SD-WAN Controller and Manager
internal pivot from an internet-facing control point
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered
vulns.weaponized: Likely worth tracking because public tooling exists and recent source activity was observed.

vulns.title: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances Server-Side Request Forgery Vulnerability
vulns.summary: This repo contains a proof-of-concept exploit for. It establishes non-root remote code execution on SonicWall SMA 1000 by implementing the Erlang protocol expected by localhost:1050 and tunneling it through the websocket for.
